steps.title: Identify the favorable and total outcomes
steps.content:
The problem asks for the probability of randomly selecting a participant with more than 120 minutes of REM sleep. From the study:
  • Favorable outcomes (>120 min REM): 53 participants
  • Total outcomes: 59 participants

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content: Probability = favorable outcomes / total outcomes: $$P = \frac{53}{59}$$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
